sections.paragraph:
Original: מזּרה

Transliteration: mazzârâh

Phonetic: maz-zaw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. Mazzaroth
    1. the 12 signs of the Zodiac and their 36 associated constellations

Origin: apparently from H5144 in the sense of distinction

TWOT entry: 1176

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
